groupSummary: These three sheets form the data-entry foundation of the CLEVER MKO loan-origination workbook. Д0 holds static organization/MKO master data (legal name in three case forms, executive director, bank requisites, INN, license) that is injected by reference into every generated document. Д1 is the borrower master record: personal identity, passport, registration vs. actual address, contacts, family/education, employment, plus a heavy income/expense analysis block whose formulas reach into the loan-terms sheet (Д2), parameters sheet (Д3), the credit-bureau/KATM sheet (b4) and the repayment schedule sheets to derive average monthly income, the new-loan payment, utility/family/other expense estimates and other income. b3 is the printable client questionnaire (АНКЕТА) — almost entirely a read-only projection of Д1 and b4 into a signable form, adding an industry-risk VLOOKUP table (M:N, 17 sectors mapped to codes), a debt-burden (DTI) ratio, and KYC/PEP self-declaration clauses. Together they identify the borrower and run the affordability check. In credit-core terms most identity fields map cleanly to the Borrower model, but the rich income/expense analysis, employment, family/education and org master data have no schema home yet and would need new fields or models for import + document generation.

sheets.name: Д0 (sheet_01) — Organization / MKO master data
sheets.purpose: Static master-data card for the lender (МЧЖ «CLEVER Mikromoliya Tashkiloti»). It stores the MKO's legal identity, director, bank requisites, INN and license in fixed cells so every other sheet/document can pull them by reference (e.g. b3 clauses reference Д0!B3). This is configuration, not per-deal data — values change only when the org's details change. Functions as a reusable letterhead/requisites block for all generated documents (contracts, questionnaire footer, acts).

sheets.name: Д1 (sheet_02) — Borrower master record + income/expense analysis
sheets.purpose: The core borrower data sheet ('Данные по Заёмщику'). Column C holds per-deal values; column B holds the field labels with Russian example hints. It captures (1) personal identity in multiple grammatical/case forms for document mail-merge, (2) passport data, (3) registration vs. actual address, (4) contact numbers, (5) family status / education, and (6) the employment + average-monthly-income affordability block. The lower block (rows 44-49) is a financial analysis engine: it derives average monthly income, the proposed new-loan annuity payment, and standardized utility/family/credit/other expense estimates by pulling from the loan-terms (Д2), parameters (Д3), KATM/credit-bureau (b4) and repayment-schedule sheets. It is the single source most other sheets (b3, b4, contracts) read from.

D43 | Телефон/доход place-of-work value | =IF(Д3!B11>36,Д1!D47,Д3!B18) — if loan term (Д3!B11) > 36 months use computed total D47, else use Д3!B18 (a parameter, here 8060000=monthly payment). Result 8060000. Depends on Д3!B11, Д1!D47, Д3!B18.

C44 | Среднемесячный доход (average monthly income) | =ROUNDUP((C48+D43)*2.2,-3) — sum of existing-credit monthly payments (C48, from b4) plus D43 (new-loan/parameter value), multiplied by 2.2 (affordability multiplier requiring income ≥2.2× total debt service), rounded UP to nearest 1000. Result 18,838,000. Depends on C48, D43.

D44 | New-loan monthly payment (annuity) | =ROUND(PMT(Д2!B19/12,36,-Д3!B15),2) — standard annuity PMT: monthly rate = annual rate Д2!B19 /12, n=36 months, principal = Д3!B15. Result 7,440,737.86. Depends on Д2!B19 (rate), Д3!B15 (loan amount).
C46 | Коммунал тўловлар (utility payments estimate) | =ROUNDUP(C44*1%,-4) — 1% of average monthly income, rounded UP to nearest 10,000. Result 190,000. Depends on C44.
C47 | Оилавий харажатлар (family expenses estimate) | =ROUNDUP(C44*1.5%,-4) — 1.5% of average monthly income, rounded UP to 10,000. Result 290,000. Depends on C44.
C48 | Кредитлар учун (existing-credit monthly burden) | ='b4 '!C9 — pulls total monthly payment on existing loans from the KATM/credit-bureau sheet b4. Result 502,353. Depends on b4!C9.
C49 | бошқалар (other expenses estimate) | =ROUNDUP(C44*0.5%,-4) — 0.5% of average monthly income, rounded UP to 10,000. Result 100,000. Depends on C44.
C50 | Длительность работы (work duration) | =C42 — mirrors total work-experience band. Depends on C42.

D45 | Прочие доходы Клиента / other income (or principal-share branch) | =IF(Д3!$B$17="аннуитетный", D44-D46, Д3!B15/36) — if repayment type is annuity, other-income slot = annuity payment D44 minus interest portion D46 (i.e. the principal portion); else (differentiated) = loan amount Д3!B15 / 36. Result 3,522,929.64. Depends on Д3!B17(type), D44, D46, Д3!B15.

D46 | Interest portion of payment | =IF(Д3!$B$17="аннуитетный", (Д3!B15*Д2!B19)/365*('График 6 мес'!B8-'График 6 мес'!I1), ('График 6 мес'!C8*'График 6 мес'!I3)/365*'График 6 мес'!H8) — annuity branch: simple daily interest = principal×annual rate /365 × day-count from the 6-month schedule; differentiated branch uses schedule cells C8,I3,H8. Result 3,917,808.22. Depends on Д3!B15, Д2!B19, Д3!B17, 'График 6 мес' cells.
D47 | Computed total (other income + interest) | =D45+D46 — sum of D45 and D46; feeds D43 when term>36. Result 7,440,737.86. Depends on D45, D46.

sheets.name: b3 (sheet_08) — Client questionnaire (МИЖОЗ АНКЕТАСИ / анкета)
sheets.purpose: The printable, client-signed questionnaire ('МИЖОЗ АНКЕТАСИ'). It is overwhelmingly a read-only projection: column D pulls almost every value from Д1 (and a few from b4) so the borrower's identity, address, contacts, family/education, employer, incomes and expenses are restated on one signable page. It adds three analytical/compliance pieces: (1) an industry-risk VLOOKUP scoring table in columns M:N (17 sectors -> numeric risk codes) with the selected sector's code surfaced in F25; (2) a debt-burden / DTI ratio in D46; (3) KYC/AML self-declaration clauses (rows 49-57) about data verification, PEP status, acting in own interest, and consent to use declared income. The '+' marks in column A flag the questionnaire fields that must be confirmed. Columns F:I per row list the multiple-choice option sets the client picks among.

groupSummary: These three sheets form the "loan-line + collateral + tranche + credit-history" core of CLEVER MKO's loan-origination workbook. Д2 holds the revolving credit-line (РКЛ) master parameters: amount split across two purposes (auto/realty vs polis), term, dates, the contractual interest rate and the penalty (overdue) rate, the order number, full pledgor (залогодатель) identity, a detailed collateral (залог) block that handles both vehicles and real estate, the agreed collateral value, and a complete insurance-company (страховая) block that computes the insured sum and premium. Д3 is the per-tranche (ТРАНШ) sheet: it selects one tranche's principal from a 5-column running-balance matrix, derives loan type (micro-loan vs micro-credit) from the 100M threshold, computes the tranche maturity date and monthly annuity payment (pulled from the schedule sheet), and the insurance payment. b4 is the АСОКИ credit-bureau summary: counts of repaid/active loans, overdue flags, total outstanding debt and average monthly payment, plus committee-decision metadata. Nearly every "(прописью)" cell is a giant nested SUBSTITUTE/ROMAN formula that converts numbers/dates into Uzbek words for contract printing. The sheets are primarily document-feeder templates: Д2 and Д3 drive the printed РКЛ agreement, tranche/credit contracts, valuation act and insurance documents; their numeric inputs map cleanly onto credit-core's CreditCase, Collateral, ValuationAct, CollateralOwner and AppConfig models, while the credit-history (b4) data and the explicit interest/penalty/insurance rate fields have no current home in the Prisma schema.

sheets.name: Д2 (РКЛ parameters + collateral + pledgor + insurance)
sheets.purpose: Master parameter sheet for the revolving credit line (РКЛ / Рамочная Кредитная Линия). It defines the credit-line amount (split into two purposes: AUTO/realty portion and POLIS/insurance-backed portion), term, dates, the contractual interest rate, the penalty rate for overdue, the deal order number; then a full block for the pledgor (залогодатель) identity (auto-pulled from sheet Д1 unless the borrower is not the owner), a dual-purpose collateral (залог) block that records either a vehicle (auto) or real estate, the agreed collateral value (залоговая стоимость), the valuation act, and an extensive insurance-company (страховая компания) block that computes the insured sum and the insurance premium. This is the central source-of-truth that almost every other sheet and printed contract reads from. Most '(прописью)' cells are giant nested ROMAN+SUBSTITUTE formulas that spell numbers/dates out in Uzbek words for the printed agreements.

sheets.name: Д3 (Tranche / ТРАНШ parameters)
sheets.purpose: Per-tranche (ТРАНШ) sheet for a single drawdown under the РКЛ. It selects the active tranche number (B1) and reads that tranche's principal from a 5-column matrix of running balances (C4..G4 with 'остаток'/remaining labels in row 5), determines the loan type (micro-loan vs micro-credit) from the 100M threshold applied to cumulative balances, derives the credit-contract number/date from the application, computes the tranche term and maturity date, links the monthly annuity payment from the payment-schedule sheet, and the insurance (sugurta) payment from Д2. It is the bridge between the credit line (Д2) and the amortization schedule.
inputFields: B1 | ТРАНШ (active tranche number 1-5) | 1 | integer
B4 | Номер кредитной заявки (loan application number) | № 1881 MFL 1199 TR | string
B5 | Дата кредитной заявки (application date) | 25.06.2026 | date
C4 | Tranche 1 principal (matrix column 1) | 130000000 | number (UZS)
D4/E4/F4/G4 | Tranche 2-5 principals (matrix columns 2-5) | (blank in sample) | number (UZS)
B11 | Срок кредита (tranche term, months) | 30 | integer (months)
B17 | Тип графика (schedule type) | аннуитетный | enum (аннуитетный 'annuity' / дифференцированный 'differentiated')
H4 | label Микроқарз (micro-loan) | Микроқарз | string (lookup label)
I4 | label Микрокредит (micro-credit) | Микрокредит | string (lookup label)
computedFields: B2 | тип кредита | =IF(B15>100000000 → Микрокредит ELSE Микроқарз). Loan-type from the selected tranche amount B15 vs 100M threshold | depends on B15
B7 | Вид кредита | =B2 | depends on B2
C7..G7 | per-column loan type | =IF(C4<=100000000, H4, I4) — each tranche column labeled micro-loan/micro-credit by its own amount vs 100M | depends on C4..G4,H4,I4

C8..G8 / C9..G9 / C10..G10 / C11..G11 | cumulative loan-type bands | =IF((C6+D4)<=100M,...), =IF((C6+D6+E4)<=100M,...), etc. — classify each successive cumulative drawdown (running totals of prior remaining balances + next tranche) against the 100M threshold to flag when the line crosses from micro-loan into micro-credit | depends on running C/D/E/F/G column totals
B8 | Номер кредитного договора | =B4 — contract number = application number | depends on B4
B9 | Дата кредитного договора | =B5 | depends on B5
B10 | contract date words | CONCATENATE(TEXT(B9,'ДД ММММ ГГГГ'),' й.') | depends on B9
B12 | Срок кредита прописью | spell B11 in Uzbek words → 'Ўттиз' (thirty) | depends on B11

B13 | Дата окончания (tranche maturity) | =IF(DAY(B9)<=15, DATE(year,month+B11,day), DATE(year,month+B11,15)) + 10 — same maturity rule as Д2: add term months, snap day to ≤15 else 15th, +10 days → 2028-12-25 | depends on B9,B11
B14 | Номер и дата кредитного договора | =B11&' от '&B10 → '30 от 25 Июнь 2026 й.' (NOTE: concatenates term B11 not contract number — likely a template quirk) | depends on B11,B10

B15 | Сумма микрозайма (selected tranche principal) | =IF(B1=C3,C4, IF(B1=D3,D4, IF(B1=E3,E4, IF(B1=F3,F4, IF(B1=G3,G4))))) — picks the matrix column whose header (C3..G3 = 1..5) equals the active tranche number B1 → 130,000,000 | depends on B1,C3..G3,C4..G4
B16 | tranche amount in words | spell B15 → 'Бир юз ўттиз миллион сўм 00 тийин' | depends on B15

sheets.name: b4 (АСОКИ credit-history / credit-bureau summary)
sheets.purpose: Credit-bureau (АСОКИ — Uzbekistan's credit information system) summary block for the borrower and co-borrowers. Captures the applicant's existing credit profile used in underwriting: count of repaid loans, count of active loans, presence of overdue or sub-standard-classified loans, other obligations (guarantees/pledges), whether they hold loans over 5M UZS, prior MKO/pawnshop borrowing, total outstanding debt and average monthly payment across existing loans. It also records the committee-decision metadata (заключение/решение КК dates). This is a risk-assessment input sheet, not a printed contract.
inputFields: C2 | Количество погашенных кредитов (number of repaid loans — borrower only; banks only) | 0 | integer
C3 | Количество имеющихся кредитов (number of active loans — borrower/co-borrower; all banks+MKO+other) | 0 | integer
C4 | Наличие просроченных кредитов или с классификацией ниже 'стандартного' (presence of overdue / sub-standard loans) | 0 | integer/flag
C5 | Прочие обязательства (поручительство, залог) (other obligations: guarantees/pledges) | 0 | integer/flag
C6 | Наличие кредитов свыше 5 млн сум (has loans over 5M UZS — borrower only) | Мавжуд эмас ('none' — D6=ИМЕЕТСЯ/has, E6=НЕ ИМЕЕТСЯ/none) | enum text
C7 | Получал ли кредит в МКО/ломбардах ранее (previously borrowed from MKO/pawnshops — borrower only) | Мавжуд эмас (D7=ПОЛУЧАЛ/did, E7=НЕ ПОЛУЧАЛ/did not) | enum text

C19 | Monthly payment reference | ='График 6 мес'!G8 → 8,060,000 — pulls monthly annuity from schedule sheet (used for affordability check vs C9 existing payments) | depends on 'График 6 мес' sheet

C11/C12 conclusion & committee-decision dates -> WorkflowEvent.createdAt | partial | workflow events capture transition timestamps but not a dedicated underwriting-conclusion or committee-decision date field
D11/D12/E12 committee protocol reference -> (none) | missing | committee protocol id/number not modeled
C19 affordability monthly payment -> (none) | missing | computed payment not stored

groupSummary: This group is the credit-scoring engine and its client-facing verdict document. Sheet "балл" is a pure calculation sheet: it pulls structured borrower/collateral/credit-history values from the application sheets (Д1 borrower anketa, Д2 loan+collateral terms, Д3 additional tranche, b3 scoring questionnaire with answer-option columns, b4 credit-history block) and converts them into a 20-factor point score out of a fixed max of 100, plus an affordability block (monthly tranches, income, expenses, surplus). Sheet "Score отчет" is a printable single-page underwriting report (Uzbek-Cyrillic): it restates loan terms (limit, term, rate), evaluates several gate conditions (problem loans, current obligations, age eligibility, income sufficiency), prints the numeric score from "балл", and renders an automatic final verdict (Approved / referred to underwriter-credit committee / failed problem-loan gate / failed income gate / score below minimum). Together they implement collect-facts -> score -> apply hard gates and a 60/70 threshold -> emit signed report. The credit-core Prisma schema currently stores case economics (amount, term, rates in AppConfig) and identity/collateral data but has NO model for the scoring factors, per-factor points, the computed score, or the report verdict — all of that is missing and would need new tables/fields to import or regenerate this document.

sheets.name: балл (Scoring score calculation)
sheets.purpose: Расчет скорингового балла — the core 20-factor scoring engine. It collects no raw data itself; every 'Значение' (value) is read from the application sheets (Д1 = borrower anketa, Д2 = loan/collateral terms, Д3 = additional tranche, b3 = scoring questionnaire whose F..J columns hold the selectable answer options, b4 = credit-history block). Each of 20 factor rows (5..24) converts a value into 'Балл' (points D-column) via IF thresholds, with a per-row 'Макс' (max E-column). D25=SUM(D5:D24)=total score (77 in this sample), E25=SUM(E5:E24)=100 max. Rows 27-31 compute the affordability / debt-service block: monthly tranches, monthly income, expenses, income-minus-expenses surplus, and income-minus-tranches — these feed factors 19 and 20 and the report's income-sufficiency gate. It is the single source of truth for the numeric score and affordability; its outputs (D25, C31, C6) are consumed by 'Score отчет'.
computedFields: C4/D4/E4 | column headers 'Значение' / 'Балл' / 'Макс' (value/points/max) | static labels, not formulas | none
D5 | Factor 1 Пол (gender) points | =IF(Д1!C10="женщина",2,1): female -> 2 pts, otherwise (male) -> 1 pt. Max 2 | Д1!C10 (gender)
C6 | Возраст (age in years) | =(TODAY()-Д1!C14)/365: today minus birth date in days /365 = age (47.04 in sample). Also reused by report age-gate B22 | Д1!C14 (birth date), TODAY()

D7 | Factor 3 Образование (education) points | =IF(b3!D41=b3!F41,3, IF(b3!D41=b3!G41,2, IF(b3!D41=b3!H41,1,0))): selected answer b3!D41 matched against option cells F41(highest)->3, G41->2, H41->1, else 0. Max 3 | b3!D41 selection vs b3!F41/G41/H41 options

D8 | Factor 4 Семейное положение (marital status) points | =IF(Д1!C32=Д1!E32,3, IF(Д1!C32=Д1!F32,2, IF(Д1!C32=Д1!G32,0,2))): status Д1!C32 equals option E32 ->3, F32 ->2, G32 ->0, else 2. Max 3 | Д1!C32 vs Д1!E32/F32/G32
D9 | Factor 5 залог (collateral type) points | =IF(Д2!B42="авто",2,4): if collateral is a car ('авто') ->2 pts, else (real estate) ->4 pts. Max 4 | Д2!B42 (collateral type)
D10 | Factor 6 Количество детей (number of children) points | =IF(b3!D22>=3,1, IF(b3!D22>=1,2,3)): >=3 children ->1; 1-2 ->2; 0 ->3 (fewer children scores higher). Max 3 | b3!D22 (children count)
D11 | Factor 7 Залогодатель (pledgor present) points | =IF(Д2!B28="да",3,1): if a pledgor exists ('да'=yes) ->3, else ->1. Max 3 | Д2!B28 (pledgor yes/no)

D12 | Factor 8 Срок проживания (residence tenure) points | =IF(b3!D15=b3!H15,3, IF(b3!D15=b3!G15,2,1)): answer D15 matches longest-tenure option H15 ->3, mid G15 ->2, else 1. Max 3 | b3!D15 vs b3!G15/H15

D13 | Factor 9 Сфера деятельности (activity sphere) points | =IF(b3!F25>18,4, IF(b3!F25>9,5,6)): metric F25 >18 ->4; >9 and <=18 ->5; <=9 ->6 (note inverted scale, lower metric scores higher). Max 6 | b3!F25 (activity metric, likely years/risk tier)
D14 | Factor 10 Должность (position) points | =IF(b3!D26=b3!F26,5, IF(b3!D26=b3!G26,4,2)): position D26 matches F26 ->5, G26 ->4, else 2. Max 5 | b3!D26 vs b3!F26/G26
D15 | Factor 11 Общий стаж (total work tenure) points | =IF(b3!D27=b3!H27,5, IF(b3!D27=b3!G27,3,1)): tenure D27 matches longest H27 ->5, mid G27 ->3, else 1. Max 5 | b3!D27 vs b3!G27/H27
D16 | Factor 12 Наличие дома (home ownership) points | =IF(b3!D42=b3!G42,1, IF(b3!D42=b3!H42,2,0)): answer D42 = G42 ->1, = H42 ->2, else 0. Max 2 | b3!D42 vs b3!G42/H42

D17 | Factor 13 Наличие депозитов (deposits) points | =IF(b3!D43=b3!H43,1, IF(b3!D43=b3!I43,2, IF(b3!D43=b3!J43,3,0))): deposit tier H43 ->1, I43 ->2, J43 ->3, else 0. Max 3 | b3!D43 vs b3!H43/I43/J43
D18 | Factor 14 Колич. погаш. кредитов (number of repaid loans) points | =IF(b4!C3>=3,3, IF(b4!C3=2,2,1)): >=3 repaid ->3; exactly 2 ->2; else (0-1) ->1. Max 3 | b4!C3 (count of fully repaid loans)
D19 | Factor 15 Прочие обязательства (other obligations) points | =IF(b4!C5=0,2,0): no other obligations ->2, otherwise ->0. Max 2 | b4!C5 (other obligations count/flag)

D20 | Factor 16 Текущие обязательства (current obligations) points | =IF(b4!C4=1,0, IF(b4!C3=0,5, IF(b4!C3=1,4, IF(b4!C3=2,2,0)))): if a current obligation flag C4=1 ->0; else by repaid-loan count C3: 0 ->5, 1 ->4, 2 ->2, else 0. Max 5 | b4!C4 (current obligation flag), b4!C3 (repaid loans)

D21 | Factor 17 Наличие кредитов свыше 5 млн сум (loans over 5M sum) points/penalty | =IF(b4!C6=b4!E6,0, IF(b3!D44=b3!H44,-5,0)): if C6 equals the neutral option E6 ->0; else if questionnaire flag D44 matches H44 -> penalty -5; else 0. Max 0 (penalty-only factor, can subtract 5) | b4!C6 vs b4!E6, b3!D44 vs b3!H44

D22 | Factor 18 Получал ли кредит в МКО/ломбардах ранее (prior MFI/pawnshop loan) points/penalty | =IF(b4!C7=b4!E7,0, IF(b3!D45=b3!H45,-5,0)): neutral option ->0; else if flag D45=H45 -> -5; else 0. Max 0 (penalty-only, can subtract 5) | b4!C7 vs b4!E7, b3!D45 vs b3!H45
C23 | Транш/доход ratio | =C27/C28: total monthly tranches / monthly income (0.4545 in sample) | C27, C28
D23 | Factor 19 Транш/доход points | =IF(C23<=0.5,22,0): if tranche-to-income ratio <=0.5 (payment <=50% of income) ->22 pts, else 0. Max 22 (highest-weighted factor) | C23
C24 | (Доход-расход)/транш ratio | =C30/C27: surplus (income-expenses) / monthly tranches (0.9736 in sample) | C30, C27

D24 | Factor 20 (Доход-расход)/транш points | =IF(C24>=1,21, IF(C24<=1,16,0)): surplus-to-tranche coverage >=1 ->21; <=1 ->16 (note: at exactly 1 the first branch wins ->21; effectively >=1 ->21 else 16). Max 21 | C24
D25 | Итого Балл (total score) | =SUM(D5:D24) = 77 in sample. THE scoring result; read by 'Score отчет' B23 | D5..D24
E25 | Итого Макс (total max) | =SUM(E5:E24) = 100 (fixed maximum) | E5..E24
C27 | Сумма траншей в месяц (total monthly tranches) | =b4!C9 + Д3!B18: primary monthly payment plus additional-tranche payment (8 562 353 in sample) | b4!C9, Д3!B18
C28 | Доходы в месяц (monthly income) | =(Д1!C44+Д1!C45): sum of two income lines (18 838 000 in sample) | Д1!C44, Д1!C45
C29 | Расходы (monthly expenses) | =C28*0.5 + SUM(Д1!C46:C49): assumes baseline living expense = 50% of income plus declared expense lines C46:C49 (10 501 353 in sample) | C28, Д1!C46:C49
C30 | Доходы - расходы (monthly surplus) | =C28-C29: income minus expenses (8 336 647 in sample) | C28, C29

C31 | Доход-расход-транши (net after debt service) | =C28-C27: income minus tranches (10 275 647 in sample). NOTE: report B19 income-sufficiency gate keys off the SIGN of this cell (balл!C31<0) | C28, C27

sheets.name: Score отчет (Scoring analysis report)
sheets.purpose: СКОРИНГ ТАХЛИЛ НАТИЖАЛАРИ — 'Results of scoring analysis': a printable, signed single-page underwriting report (Uzbek-Cyrillic). It is NOT a data-entry sheet; almost every cell is a formula that restates application data and the scoring outcome for the credit manager / committee. It (1) prints header identity + loan terms pulled from Д1/Д2, (2) runs five gate checks rendered as 'Талабларга мос келади' (meets requirements) / 'мос келмайди' (does not) / 'хавола' (referred to committee) / 'тўлдирилмаган' (data not filled), (3) prints the numeric Скоринг балл from 'балл', and (4) computes ХУЛОСА (final conclusion). The hidden columns G/H/I/J/K hold the verdict text constants that the IF formulas select. Ends with 'Кредит менежери имзоси' (credit manager signature) line.
inputFields: B17/C18/etc | 'Гаровга кўйилган талаблар' & general-terms rows | hard-coded 'Талабларга мос келади' (meets requirements) text in B17/C17/D17 and B18/C18/D18 | these two gate rows are static text, effectively manually set (no formula) — operator/template default. type: text/enum
computedFields: A6 | Sana (date) | =Д2!B13 -> '25 Июнь 2026 й.' application/decision date | Д2!B13
B8/C8/D8 | МИЖОЗ Ф.И.Ш. (client full name) | =Д1!C2 -> full name (merged across B:D) | Д1!C2 (borrower fullName)
B9 | Манзил (address) | =Д1!C20 -> borrower address | Д1!C20
B10 | Фаолият тури (activity type) | =Д1!C36 -> e.g. self-employed citizen + reg number | Д1!C36
B11 | Кредит тури (credit type) | =Д2!C1 -> 'Микромолия линия' (microfinance credit line) | Д2!C1
A12 | label 'Микромолия линияси лимити' (credit-line limit) | static string formula | none

B12 | Limit amount in words | =""&FIXED(Д2!B4,2)&" ("&Д2!B5&")  сўм" -> '150 000 000,00 (Бир юз эллик миллион сўм 00 тийин) сўм': numeric limit Д2!B4 formatted to 2 decimals + amount-in-words Д2!B5 | Д2!B4 (amount), Д2!B5 (amount in words)
A13/B13 | Муддати (term) | =" "&Д2!B9&" ("&Д2!B10&") ой" -> ' 60 (Олтмиш) ой': term months Д2!B9 + words Д2!B10 + 'ой'(months) | Д2!B9, Д2!B10
A14/B14 | Фоиз ставкаси (interest rate) | =" "&Д2!B20&"% ("&Д2!B21&") фоиз" -> ' 55% (Эллик беш) фоиз': rate Д2!B20 + words Д2!B21 | Д2!B20, Д2!B21

B19/C19/D19 | Даромадларнинг етарлилиги (income sufficiency gate) | =IF(балл!C31<0,G22,H22): if net (income - tranches) is NEGATIVE -> G22 'Талабларга мос келмайди' (fails); else -> H22 'мос келади' (passes). i.e. income must cover all tranches | балл!C31

B20/C20/D20 | Муаммоли кредитлар (problem-loans gate) | =IF(b4!C4="",I21, IF(b4!C4=0,H21,G21)): credit-history field b4!C4 empty -> I21 'Кредит тарихи маълумотлари тўлдирилмаган' (history not filled); =0 -> H21 'Талабларга мос келади' (no problem loans); else -> G21 'Кредит қўмитаси қарорига хавола' (referred to credit committee) | b4!C4

B21/C21/D21 | Жорий мажбуриятлари (current obligations gate) | =IF(b4!C3="",I22, IF(b4!C3>=3,G22,H22)): repaid-loan count b4!C3 empty -> I22 'тўлдирилмаган'; >=3 -> G22 'мос келмайди' (too many) ; else -> H22 'мос келади'. NOTE references B/C/H columns of row 22 | b4!C3

B22/C22/D22 | Ёшга мувофиқлиги (age eligibility gate) | =IF(балл!C6>68,G22, IF(балл!C6<18,G22,H22)): age >68 OR <18 -> G22 'мос келмайди' (out of 18-68 range); otherwise -> H22 'мос келади' | балл!C6 (age)
B23/C23/D23 | Скоринг балл (numeric score) | =балл!D25 -> 77: the total score from the scoring sheet | балл!D25

B24/C24/D24 | ХУЛОСА (final conclusion) | =IF(B23<60,K24, IF(B20=H20,H24, IF(B21=G21,G24, IF(B22=G22,G24, IF(B23>=70,J24, IF(B23>=60,G24,G24)))))): score<60 -> K24 'Скоринг балл минимал талабдан паст' (below minimum); else if problem-loans row B20 = H20 'Муаммоли кредитлар мавжуд' -> H24 'failed problem-loan stage'; else if current-obl B21 = G21 'хавола' -> G24 'referred to underwriter/credit committee'; else if age B22 = G22 'мос келмайди' -> G24 referred; else if score>=70 -> J24 'Маъқулланди' (APPROVED); else (60-69) -> G24 referred. Result in sample: 'Маъқулланди' (Approved). Effective rule: <60 reject; 60-69 = manual review; >=70 = auto-approve UNLESS any hard gate (problem loans / age / obligations) trips, which forces referral/fail | B23, B20, B21, B22 and constant cells G24/H24/J24/K24

G17:I20, G22, G24:K24 | verdict text constants | static option strings selected by the IF formulas above (e.g. G22 'Талабларга мос келмайди', H22 'Талабларга мос келади', J24 'Маъқулланди', K24 'Скоринг балл минимал талабдан паст') | none

groupSummary: Sheets #5 ("договор рус") and #15 ("договор узб") are the two language versions (Russian + Uzbek Cyrillic) of the microloan agreement (Микрозайм/Микрокредит шартномаси) generated by CLEVER MIKROMOLIYA TASHKILOTI. Both are pure document-generation templates: nearly every cell is either a fixed legal-clause string or a formula that concatenates values pulled from the input sheets Д0 (lender/MFO org reference), Д1 (borrower passport & contacts), Д2 (general agreement / collateral / insurance / rate parameters) and Д3 (this specific loan's number, amount, term, dates, amount-in-words). They contain NO human-entered input cells of their own — all variable data is by-reference. The contracts encode the core economic terms (loan amount, term, 55% base annual rate, 105% penalty rate on overdue principal, 365/366 day basis, late-payment penalty tiers 0/0.5/1.0/2.0% capped at 50% of annual loan), the collateral clause that branches between AUTO (3.1.1 vehicle) and REAL_ESTATE (3.1.1 ipoteka) based on Д2!B42, and the optional insurance clause (3.1.2) shown only when Д2!B63="да". For the credit-core replacement these two sheets are the source of truth for the loan-agreement PDF generator: they define exactly which fields must be surfaced (borrower identity, collateral specifics, rates, dates, guarantor/co-pledgor presence, insurance) and how they are formatted (FIXED 2-decimal amounts, sum-in-words, Russian date formats).

sheets.name: договор рус (Sheet #5)
sheets.purpose: Russian-language microloan agreement (Договор микрозайма) — the printable loan contract signed by the MFO and the borrower. It is a fully formula-driven template: header/parties/subject/collateral/insurance clauses are assembled by concatenating reference data from sheets Д0, Д1, Д2, Д3, while the bulk of the legal body (sections 4-12) is static boilerplate. Role in lifecycle: produced at contract-signing stage (after case approval) as one of the official output documents handed to the borrower.
computedFields: A1/B1/C1 | Contract title | ="Микрозайм шартномаси "&Д3!B8 → 'Микрозайм шартномаси № 1881 MFL 1199 TR'; loan/agreement number text | dependsOn: Д3!B8
A3 | Place & date | ="г. Ташкент … "&TEXT(Д3!B9,"ДД.ММ.ГГГГ")&" г." → city Tashkent + contract date formatted dd.mm.yyyy | dependsOn: Д3!B9

A5 | Parties preamble | Concatenates lender legal name (Д0!B3), executive director (Д0!B5), license No (Д0!B17) + date (Д0!B18), borrower full name (Д1!C2), passport series/number (Д1!C17) + issue text (Д1!C18), and application date (Д3!B5). Encodes the 'between МФО … and citizen …' opening clause | dependsOn: Д0!B3,Д0!B5,Д0!B17,Д0!B18,Д1!C2,Д1!C17,Д1!C18,Д3!B5

A8 | Clause 1.1 subject/amount/term | ="1.1. … микрозайм на общую сумму "&FIXED(Д3!B15,2)&" ("&Д3!B16&") сум … на срок с "&Д3!B10&" по "&TEXT(Д3!B13,"ДД ММММ ГГГГ")&" г." → loan amount (2-dec) + amount-in-words, start date, end date | dependsOn: Д3!B15,Д3!B16,Д3!B10,Д3!B13

A10 | Clause 1.3 general agreement link | Inserts microfinance-line general-agreement number (Д2!B3) and its date (Д2!B11, dd.mm.yyyy). Ties this loan to the master/credit-line agreement | dependsOn: Д2!B3,Д2!B11

A16 | Clause 2.4 interest rates | Base annual rate (Д2!B20) % + words (Д2!B21) on outstanding balance, 365/366-day basis; on overdue principal a penalty rate (Д2!B23) % + words (Д2!B24). RULE: example values 55% normal, 105% on overdue principal | dependsOn: Д2!B20,Д2!B21,Д2!B23,Д2!B24

groupSummary: These four sheets are printable legal/official documents auto-generated from a handful of input sheets in the same workbook: Д0 (organisation constants: MFI name, director, bank requisites), Д1 (borrower identity), Д2 (loan economics + collateral details), Д3 (dates, schedule type) plus an external [9]malumot workbook supplying boilerplate terminology (e.g. "mikroqarz", company name). None of these four sheets capture new human input themselves — every cell is either a static legal clause or a formula stitching the input-sheet values into prose. They span the credit lifecycle right after underwriting: Ходатайство (the borrower's petition to open a micro-finance line), Протокол (the credit-committee decision excerpt approving it), РКЛ Ген (the master General Agreement / credit-line contract setting all terms, penalty tiers and the S=L-D revolving-limit formula), and Акт согласования (the tripartite act fixing the agreed collateral value). For credit-core they are the document-generation layer: their data inputs map well onto CreditCase, Borrower, Collateral, CollateralOwner and ValuationAct, but several constants (MFI/bank requisites, director name, default-interest rate, penalty schedule, insurance-company details, committee protocol number/wording) have no home in the current Prisma schema and would need new config/template models.

sheets.name: Ходатайство (Petition / Murojaatnoma — sheet_09)
sheets.purpose: Printable petition (Uzbek: 'Murojaatnoma', Russian: 'Ходатайство') in which the borrower formally asks the MFI's executive director to open a micro-finance line (ММЛ/MFL) on stated terms. It is the borrower-initiated opening document of the loan lifecycle, addressed to the director, listing the requested limit, term, interest rates, collateral and the consents/acknowledgements the borrower agrees to. Entirely template-driven: every visible cell is a formula concatenating values pulled from input sheets Д0/Д1/Д2/Д3. The A:D columns are merged duplicates of one body column (4-up layout for print).
computedFields: B1:D1 | Addressee header | '<Д0!B3> ижрочи директори' = '<MFI legal name> executive director'; pulls MFI name constant | Д0!B3
D2 | Director name | =Д0!B6 -> director short name (e.g. 'Б.Исмоилов') | Д0!B6

A9:D9 | Line limit clause | '2. Микромолия линия лимит суммаси: <FIXED(Д2!B4,2)> (<Д2!B5>) сўмгача' = micro-finance line limit amount, numeric formatted to 2 decimals plus its words-spelling, 'up to ... soum' | Д2!B4 (limit amount number), Д2!B5 (amount in words)
A10:D10 | Line term clause | '3. ...муддати: <Д2!B9> (<Д2!B10>) ой' = line term in months (number + words), e.g. '60 (Олтмиш) ой' | Д2!B9 (term months), Д2!B10 (term in words)

A11:D11 | Interest-rate clause | '4. ...фоиз ставкаси: йиллик <Д2!B20>% (<Д2!B21>) ... муддати ўтган ... <Д2!B23>% (<Д2!B24>)' = annual rate on outstanding balance (e.g. 55%) AND overdue/penalty annual rate on overdue principal (e.g. 105%), each as number + words | Д2!B20 (annual rate %), Д2!B21 (rate words), Д2!B23 (overdue rate %), Д2!B24 (overdue rate words)

A13:D13 | Collateral description (branch on collateral type) | =IF(Д2!B42="авто", F13, G13): if collateral is a vehicle use the auto sentence (F13), else use the real-estate sentence (G13). F13='- <Д2!B35> га тегишли <Д2!B46> русумли автомототранспорт воситаси' (owner + vehicle model). G13='- <Д2!B35> га тегишли <Д2!C44> манзилда жойлашган <Д2!C47>' (owner + address + property type) | Д2!B42 (collateral kind switch 'авто' vs real estate), Д2!B35 (collateral owner name), Д2!B46 (vehicle model), Д2!C44 (property address), Д2!C47 (property type)

A14:D14 | Insurance-policy line (conditional) | =IF(Д2!B63="да", F14, " "): if insurance flag = 'да'(yes) show '- Суғурта компаниясининг кредит қайтмаслик риски полиси' (credit-default insurance policy), else blank. Note H13/H26 comment 'Если обеспечывается только автомобилем полис скрыть' = hide policy line when secured only by a car | Д2!B63 (insurance-required flag да/нет)
A15:D15 | Consent intro | '    <Д1!C2> қуйидагилардан хабардор қилинган...' = borrower (full name) has been informed and consents | Д1!C2 (borrower full name)
A18:D18 | Non-obligation clause | references borrower short form <Д1!C3> (e.g. 'TADJIYEV A.J.') in clause stating MFI is not obliged to conclude micro-loan contracts | Д1!C3 (borrower short name)
A19:D19 | Document-retention clause | '- <Д1!C2> томонидан тақдим этилган хужжатлар...' borrower full name | Д1!C2
A21:D21 | Petition date | 'Мурожаатнома санаси: <Д3!B5>й.' = petition date (e.g. 25.06.2026) | Д3!B5 (petition/application date)
A22:D22 | Signature line | '<Д1!C2>    имзо ___________________' = borrower full name + signature blank | Д1!C2

sheets.name: Протокол (Credit-committee protocol excerpt — sheet_10)
sheets.purpose: Printable excerpt ('protokoldan ko'chirma') of the Credit Committee meeting protocol where the MFI's credit committee reviews and APPROVES (QAROR QILADI / resolves) granting the micro-loan to the borrower on specific terms. It is the underwriting-decision document: it restates the loan amount, term, interest rate, collateral and the committee's resolution. Maps to the credit-core workflow approval/decision step. Like the others it is fully formula-driven from Д1/Д2/Д3 plus the external [9]malumot workbook (which supplies generic terms such as 'mikroqarz' and the MFI name). Contains a notable helper: an ordinal-number lookup (H8/H9 row) that converts a question/issue number 1..25 into its Uzbek ordinal word ('Birinchi','Ikkinchi',...).

sheets.name: РКЛ Ген (General Agreement / micro-finance line master contract — sheet_11)
sheets.purpose: The full printable General Agreement ('Бош келишув', 'РКЛ Ген' = Ramochnyy Kreditnyy Liniya General) for opening a micro-finance line — the master credit-line contract between the MFI ('ММТ') and the borrower ('Қарз олувчи'). Under it, individual micro-loan contracts are later concluded. It is the core legal contract: it defines the line limit, term/validity window, the revolving sub-limit formula S=L-D, per-term sub-contract windows, interest and default-interest rates, the tiered penalty (peня) schedule, acceptance-less bank-account debit consent, collateral (real estate vs auto branch), credit-default insurance, parties' rights, dispute resolution and requisites. Almost all clauses are static legal text; the variable cells are formulas from Д0/Д1/Д2. A:C columns are 3-up merged duplicates.

A10:C16 | 2.3 Sub-contract term windows | final maturity ≤ <Д2!B9> months; then a fixed table mapping sub-loan tenor to the window (from agreement date) in which such sub-contracts may be signed: ≤6mo→within 54mo; ≤12mo→48mo; ≤18mo→42mo; ≤24mo→36mo; ≤30mo→30mo; ≤33mo→27mo; ≤48mo→12mo. A19:C19 | 2.5 Penalty (peня) tiers | STATIC schedule: days 1–5 overdue = 0%; days 6–30 = 0.5%/?; days 31–60 = 1.0%; days 61–120 = 2.0% of overdue amount; total accrued interest+penalty capped at 50% of annual loan amount | (static thresholds, no cell refs)

groupSummary: This group consists of five output/printable document templates in the CLEVER MKO loan-origination workbook: the executive director's deal order (Приказ на сделку, sheet 14), the borrower's credit application (Кредитная заявка, sheet 16), the case-file cover page (обложка, sheet 24), an income certificate (Справка о доходах, sheet 29), and the file document checklist (перечень, sheet 30). Almost every cell is a formula that pulls from upstream source sheets: Д0 (company/director config), Д1 (client card / anketa), Д2 (deal terms, collateral, insurance), Д3 (loan request parameters), Ходатайство (petition text), and 'Акт согласования' (collateral valuation reconciliation). They contain very little human input themselves — they are presentation/document-generation layers that assemble the MFL (microfinance line / микромолия линияси) deal narrative, collateral descriptions, repayment terms, and signatory blocks. The income certificate (Справка) is the one true data-entry sheet, capturing 12 months of salary to derive average monthly income. Together they define the document-generation requirements for the replacement system: each maps cleanly onto CreditCase + Borrower + Collateral + ValuationAct, but income-history, application/order numbering, insurance, and signatory/director metadata are not yet modeled in the credit-core Prisma schema.

sheets.name: Приказ на сделку (sheet 14)
sheets.purpose: Executive director's deal ORDER (БУЙРУҒИ / приказ на сделку) authorizing the opening of a microfinance line (MFL / микромолия линияси) for a specific client. It is a fully computed, printable document: the director states 'I, <director>, executive director of <company>, order that a microloan/microcredit be allocated to citizen <client> on the following terms' and then enumerates the line form, limit amount, term, interest rate, and the pledged collateral (auto and/or real estate) with full identifying details. It is the formal internal approval artifact in the loan lifecycle, generated after terms are agreed.

sheets.name: Кредитная заявка (sheet 16)
sheets.purpose: Borrower's credit APPLICATION (АРИЗА / кредитная заявка) addressed to the executive director, formally requesting the microcredit. A fully computed printable form stating the applicant's residence, citizenship, full name, birth date, passport data, principal place of activity, position, average monthly income, then the requested terms (amount, term, interest rate, repayment method), the offered collateral, an insurance-policy line, an authorization to debit the borrower's bank cards/accounts without acceptance upon overdue debt, and consent checkboxes for credit-bureau / collateral-registry data queries. Ends with applicant signature block.

sheets.name: Справка о доходах (sheet 29)
sheets.purpose: Income CERTIFICATE (СПРАВКА о полученных доходах) — an employer-style salary statement for the borrower covering 12 months, used to evidence income for the credit application. This is the workbook's main DATA-ENTRY sheet for income: an operator types monthly gross salary and the sheet computes bonus, income tax (НДФЛ/ИНПС), net payout, yearly totals, and the average monthly income (which feeds the application's 'average monthly income' line). Includes employer legal-entity details (name, INN, legal address) and signature blocks for director and chief accountant.

groupSummary: These 7 sheets ("График 6/12/18/24/30/33/48 мес") are printable loan amortization schedules (Тўлов жадвали) attached as "Илова №1" (Annex 1) to the loan contract. They are structurally IDENTICAL — the same per-row amortization engine copied down for more months; the only meaningful differences are (a) the number of installment rows, (b) the first-payment day-of-month cap (15 in the 6-month variant, 25 in all others), and (c) a Norm/DSR sanity-check block (cols M/N/O) that exists only in the 18-month sheet. None of them store their own loan parameters: principal, term (I2), rate (I3), disbursement date (I1) and the annuity-vs-differentiated flag all flow in from the Д3 / Д2 calculator sheets, and the first sheet (6 мес) is the master that the others reference for the contract header and the signature/requisites block. The amortization math is a hybrid: principal is either annuity-style (PMT-based) or differentiated (principal/term) depending on Д3!B17, but interest is ALWAYS computed on the actual outstanding balance with an actual/365 (366 in leap years) day-count between real payment dates, and every installment's grand total is rounded UP to the nearest 1000 som via CEILING. IMPORTANT: the sheet NAME does not equal the real term — in the dump all 7 sheets carry the same loan (term=30), so e.g. "График 33 мес" overflows past the true 30-month payoff and produces garbage negative/huge rows after the loan is already repaid (rows 31-33). The replacement system should generate exactly termMonths rows, not a fixed template length.

sheets.name: График 6 мес (sheet_17, MASTER schedule)
sheets.purpose: Printable amortization schedule (Тўлов жадвали) for a 6-installment loan, attached to the contract as Илова №1 (Annex 1). This is the MASTER of the 7 schedule sheets: it reads loan parameters directly from the Д3/Д2 calculator sheets and from the договор (contract) sheets, and the other 6 schedule sheets pull their header, requisites and signature blocks from this sheet. Acts as the legally-binding payment plan the borrower signs.
inputFields: (none entered on this sheet directly) | All inputs are pulled from other sheets — see crossSheetRefs. The only 'authored' values are the static column headers and the footnote text.
B6/C6/D6 headers | column titles: № / Тўлов санаси (payment date) / Асосий қарз қолдиғи (principal balance) / Тўлов суммаси сўм (payment amount, som) | header labels | text
D7/E7/F7/G7 sub-headers | асосий қарз (principal) / асосий қарз / фоизлар* (interest*) / Жами* (total*) | header labels | text
A16 footnote | 'If principal repayment is delayed, the interest amount changes, because per clause 2.4 of the contract interest is accrued on the actual outstanding principal' | legal note | text
computedFields: C1 | Contract reference line | =' '&Д3!B10&' даги '&Д3!B4&' шартномасига' → '25 Июнь 2026 й. даги № 1881 MFL 1199 TR шартномасига'. Concatenates contract date (Д3!B10) + contract number (Д3!B4) into the annex header. | depends on Д3!B10, Д3!B4

H1 | Payment day-of-month cap | =IF(DAY(I1)>15,15,DAY(I1)) → 15. RULE: for the 6-month variant the monthly payment day is capped at the 15th; if the disbursement day is <=15 it keeps that day. (All OTHER 6 sheets cap at 25, not 15 — this is the single distinguishing input.) | depends on I1
I1 | Disbursement / contract date | =Д3!B9 → 25.06.2026. Origination date; day0 for interest accrual. | depends on Д3!B9
I2 | Term in months (nper) | =Д3!B11 → 30. Number of installments; drives how many rows are 'active' (rows where A<=I2). NOTE value is 30 even though sheet is named '6 мес'. | depends on Д3!B11
I3 | Annual interest rate | =Д2!B19 → 0.55 (55%). Used as I3/12 for PMT and I3/365 for daily interest. | depends on Д2!B19

H6/I6 | Annuity installment (PMT) | =ROUND(PMT(I3/12,I2,-Д3!B15),2) → 8059324.65. Standard annuity payment: monthly rate=annual/12, nper=term, PV=principal. Used as the fixed payment in annuity mode. | depends on I3, I2, Д3!B15
B8 | First payment date | =J8 → 2026-07-15. J8=DATE(YEAR(I1),MONTH(I1)+1,H1): one month after disbursement, on the capped day. | depends on I1, H1
C8 | Opening principal | =Д3!B15 → 130000000. Loan principal (note: H6 uses Д3!B15 too; later sheets set C8=ГрафикD12мес!C8). | depends on Д3!B15

D8/E8 | Principal portion of installment | =IF(Д3!B17='аннуитетный', H6-F8, C8/I2). RULE: annuity → payment minus interest; differentiated → principal/term (equal principal each period). D and E are duplicates (merged display). | depends on Д3!B17, H6, F8, C8, I2

F8 | Interest portion (first row) | =IF(Д3!B17='аннуитетный',(C8*I3)/365*(B8-I1),(C8*I3)/365*H8) → 3917808.22. RULE: interest = balance * annualRate/365 * daysInPeriod. First period day-count = B8-I1 (disbursement to first payment, a partial month). Day-count is ACTUAL/365 in BOTH modes. | depends on C8, I3, B8, I1, H8
G8 | Installment grand total | =CEILING(SUM(D8:F8),1000) → 8060000. RULE: principal+interest rounded UP to nearest 1000 som. | depends on D8,E8?,F8 (sums D8:F8)
H8 | Days in first period | =B8-I1 → 20. Day gap disbursement→first payment. | depends on B8, I1
I8 | Days in year | =DATE(YEAR(B8),12,31)-DATE(YEAR(B8),1,1)+1 → 365/366. Leap-year aware year length (informational; interest divisor is hard-coded /365). | depends on B8
B9..B13 | Subsequent payment dates | =IF(A<=I2,DATE(YEAR(B8),MONTH(B8)+prevA,DAY(B8)),0). RULE: row n date = first date + (n-1) months, but 0 if row index exceeds term. | depends on B8, A column, I2
C9..C13 | Running principal balance | =C(prev)-D(prev). Declining balance. | depends on prior C and D
F9..F13 | Interest per period | =IF(annuity,(C*I3)/365*(B-Bprev),(C*I3)/365*H). Interest on current balance * rate/365 * actual days since last payment. | depends on C, I3, B, H
D13/E13 | Final principal = full remaining balance | =C13 → balance. RULE: last installment repays the entire remaining principal (balloon-closes the schedule to 0). | depends on C13
D14/E14 | TOTAL principal | =SUM(D8:E13) → 130000000. Must equal loan amount. | depends on D8:E13
F14 | TOTAL interest | =G14-D14 → 31875000. Total paid minus principal. | depends on G14, D14
G14 | TOTAL paid | =SUM(G8:G13) → 161875000. Sum of all installment totals. | depends on G8:G13

sheets.name: График 18 мес (sheet_19)
sheets.purpose: 18-installment amortization schedule, Илова №1. Same engine, 18 active rows (8..25). UNIQUE feature: an extra Norm/DSR sanity-check block in columns M/N/O (rows 13-19) that flags whether 2x cumulative interest exceeds the opening balance — i.e. an interest-burden ceiling check not present on any other schedule sheet.

groupSummary: This group contains four printable Russian/Uzbek documents for the post-disbursement and collections phase of the loan lifecycle. Sheets 25-27 (Акт мониторинга 1/2/3) are nearly identical collateral re-inspection acts (далолатнома) generated at scheduled intervals after disbursement: act 1 at base date +180 days, act 2 at +360 days, act 3 at +540 days. Each act restates the borrower, the general financing-line agreement, the pledged collateral (both auto and real-estate blocks), its agreed pledge value, and certifies a satisfactory visual inspection, then collects signatures from the executive director and the debtor. Sheet 28 (Претензион) is a pre-litigation claim/demand letter addressed to the Mirabad inter-district civil court, with copies to the borrower (Заемщик) and pledgor (Залогодатель), warning of court enforcement against the collateral if overdue debt is not repaid. None of these sheets accept fresh human input directly — they are pure presentation templates that pull every value from upstream data/source sheets (Д0 organization, Д1 borrower, Д2 collateral/valuation, Д3 schedule, Акт согласования, Приказ на сделку, and the preceding monitoring act). For the credit-core import + document-generation features, these map cleanly onto CreditCase, Borrower, Collateral, CollateralOwner and ValuationAct, but several presentation-specific facts (monitoring schedule offsets, agreed-value-in-words, registry/cadastre numbers, the claim-letter recipient court) are partial or missing in the Prisma schema.

sheets.name: Акт мониторинга1 (sheet 25)
sheets.purpose: Post-disbursement collateral monitoring act #1 (далолатнома / далолатнома акти) in Uzbek (Cyrillic). The MKO executive director certifies that, in the presence of the borrower, the pledged property securing the general financing-line agreement was physically re-inspected and found in satisfactory condition. It is the first of three scheduled monitoring acts; its inspection due-date is the disbursement/agreement base date (Д3!B9) + 180 days. It is a fully template-driven printable document: every field is a cross-sheet reference, there is no direct human data entry on this sheet.

A1:H1 | Header line 'Фуқаро <borrower> билан имзоланган' (signed with citizen <borrower>) | ="Фуқаро "&" "&Д1!C2&" билан имзоланган" — concatenates borrower full name | Д1!C2

A2:H2 | Sub-title: '<dd.mm.yyyy> йилдаги <agreement no> микромолиялаш линияси очиш тўғрисидаги Бош келишувга асосан ... гаровга кўйилган мол мулкнинг текширув' | =TEXT(Д2!B11,"ДД.ММ.ГГГГ")&...&Д2!B3&... — formats agreement date and inserts agreement number | Д2!B11 (agreement date), Д2!B3 (agreement number)

sheets.name: Претензион (sheet 28)
sheets.purpose: Pre-litigation claim / demand letter (претензия) in Russian, used in the collections/recovery phase. Issued by ООО «CLEVER MIKROMOLIYA TASHKILOTI» and addressed to the Mirabad inter-district civil court (МИРАБАДСКИЙ МЕЖРАЙОННЫЙ СУД ПО ГРАЖДАНСКИМ ДЕЛАМ), with copies to the Заемщик (borrower) and Залогодатель (pledgor). It restates the general financing-line agreement (number, date, principal amount) and the pledged collateral (auto + real-estate blocks), then issues a SECOND/repeated warning (ПОВТОРНО ПРЕДУПРЕЖДАЕМ) that, absent repayment of the overdue debt, the MKO will refer documents to the courts to enforce/recover against the listed property. Printable template; the only blank human fields are the letter number and date.
